content.text: Gear specialist and battlefield engineer. Two branches — Grenadier (throwables: burst area effects) and Trapper (deployables: persistent map control). Abilities supplement the augment-and-item system, enhancing grenades, deployables, and field engineering. The class is augment-heavy and item-heavy — abilities supplement rather than define.

System Scan (Passive): At the start of combat, automatically identify one enemy's weakest stat. Your HUD highlights the vulnerability. Additionally, you can see deployable HP, remaining grenade count, and all mechanical/tech objects in Medium range through walls (thermal-tech overlay).
T2 — Trained Techniques (300 cr each, 1 downtime)

rows: Items you use in combat cost 1 less AP (minimum 0). Stims, scrubbers, grenades — all faster in your hands. Stacks with Quick Arm (grenade can be 0 AP via augment + items generally cheaper via ability).
Mark a tile within Long range. Your next grenade thrown at that tile this turn gets +1d4 damage and ignores cover for targets on that specific tile. You calculated the angles.
You can disarm enemy explosives, traps, and mines at Medium range (Interface check, DC 6). On success, you recover the device and can use it yourself. On failure, it detonates.
Restore 1d6 HP to a deployable within Close range. Can bring a destroyed deployable back to 1 HP if you're adjacent (costs 2 AP instead). Your hands fix what's broken.
Command a turret you control to focus fire on a specific tile. Until your next turn, the turret attacks ANY creature that enters or occupies that tile (uses Reaction, once per enemy). Lane lockdown.

After combat, you recover 1 grenade of any type you used during the encounter (duds, partial detonations — you make it work). Additionally, you can strip enemy tech gear for 1d6 × 5 credits of components per encounter.

content.text: T3 — Advanced Techniques (600 cr each, 2 downtime)

rows: Throw a grenade that bounces across 3 tiles in a line before detonating. Each tile it passes through takes half damage (or half effect for non-damage grenades). The final tile takes full effect. Carpet bombing a corridor.

You are immune to your own grenade effects (damage, DoT, conditions). You can drop grenades at your own feet. Pair with Blast Shaping and you can detonate in the middle of a melee without hurting allies or yourself.
Spend 20 cr worth of components from inventory. Create a basic Frag grenade (2d6, 5ft) on the spot. In a pinch, anything is a bomb.

Designate a 15ft × 15ft area within Medium range. For the rest of the encounter, you have perfect awareness of that zone — enemies in the zone can't stealth, all allies get +1 accuracy against targets in the zone, and your deployables in the zone get +2 to hit. Requires at least one Sensor Net or turret in or adjacent to the zone. Command center.
When a deployable you control is destroyed by an enemy, it detonates for 1d8 damage to the attacker. You rigged them all. Touch my stuff and it bites back.
Move a turret you control up to 10ft (2 tiles). The turret can fire the same turn it moves. Repositioning without retrieving and redeploying.

Sacrifice one active deployable. Immediately deploy a different deployable from your inventory in the same tile for 0 AP. Swap a Sensor Net for a Mine when the enemy reaches the chokepoint. Adapt on the fly.

content.text: T4 — Master Techniques (1,000 cr each, 3 downtime)

rows: Throw 3 grenades simultaneously. Each must target a different tile, all within Medium range. Each grenade has full effect. Costs 3 grenades from inventory. Once per encounter. You empty the bag.

Modify a grenade before throwing. Choose one: double damage but halve radius, remove AoE entirely and target a single creature for triple damage, or quadruple the radius but halve damage. Custom detonation.
Deploy up to 3 deployables simultaneously from your inventory, all within Close range. All three are deployed, synced, and active immediately. Once per encounter. Instant firebase.

Your turrets fire twice per round instead of once (start of your turn AND end of your turn). Mines have +5ft trigger radius. Sensor Nets reveal enemy augments and equipment in addition to position. Your network is self-optimizing.

All equipment you operate gets +1 to its effect. Turrets deal +1 per damage die. Grenades deal +1 per damage die. Med Dispensers heal +1 per die. Barrier Generators gain +2 HP. Your hands make everything better.
